table_description: The BRANCH table stores information about different branches, with a composite primary key consisting of branch_id, region_code, subregion_code, and office_code. It provides details about the geographical and organizational structure of the branches.

columns.name: branch_id
columns.description: The branch_id column uniquely identifies records in the table, serving as part of the primary key to distinguish between different branches.

columns.name: gsscore_servicebranchnumber
columns.description: The gsscore_servicebranchnumber column stores a string value that may represent a service branch number, potentially used for analytical purposes to track or identify specific services or branches.

columns.name: region_code
columns.description: The region_code column is part of the primary key, uniquely identifying records and possibly representing a geographical region, which can be used for aggregation or filtering in data analysis.

columns.name: region
columns.description: The region column stores a string value representing the name of a geographical region, which can be used for analytical purposes such as grouping or categorizing data by location.

columns.name: subregion_code
columns.description: The subregion_code column is part of the primary key, uniquely identifying records and possibly representing a subregion within a larger geographical area, useful for detailed geographical analysis.

columns.name: subregion
columns.description: The subregion column stores a string value representing the name of a subregion, providing additional geographical context for data analysis and filtering.

columns.name: gbo
columns.description: The gbo column stores a string value, but its purpose is ambiguous without additional context, potentially requiring further clarification for effective use in data analysis.

columns.name: office_code
columns.description: The office_code column is part of the primary key, uniquely identifying records and possibly representing a specific office location, useful for tracking or analyzing data at the office level.

columns.name: office_name
columns.description: The office_name column stores a string value representing the name of an office, providing a human-readable identifier for offices, which can be used for filtering, grouping, or displaying data in reports and analyses.
